function.name: create_observations
function.arguments: {"observations":[{"content": "Yuki is working on debugging latency issues with Hermes.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki fixed a bug related to Bonsai's $ORIGIN RPATH.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki fixed a bug related to tool_choice \"any\".", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki increased Ollama's context length to 65k.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki set OLLAMA_GPU_OVERHEAD to 8GiB to coexist with Bonsai.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki observed that qwen3.6:35b is slow on CPU, taking over 100 seconds per turn.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki wants to try using the -ot flag in llama.cpp for expert layer CPU offloading.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki lives in Kyoto.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki is a backend engineer.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki likes matcha and climbing.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}, {"content": "Yuki owns a dog named Komugi.", "observation_type": "explicit", "confidence": 1.0}]}
